draftNarratives.label: Homebound Reason
draftNarratives.draft: The patient is homebound due to severe mobility limitations and chronic pain, as documented in the referral and clinical records.

draftNarratives.label: Medical Necessity
draftNarratives.draft: The patient requires home health services due to severe mobility limitations, chronic pain, and the need for skilled nursing care as documented in the referral and clinical records.

draftNarratives.label: Patient Summary / Clinical Narrative
draftNarratives.draft: The patient is a [age]-year-old [gender] with a history of [relevant medical history]. The patient is homebound due to severe mobility limitations and chronic pain. The patient requires skilled nursing care and physical therapy to manage symptoms and improve functional status.

draftNarratives.label: Skilled Interventions
draftNarratives.draft: Skilled interventions include nursing care, physical therapy, and pain management. The patient requires ongoing assessment and management of chronic pain and mobility limitations.

draftNarratives.label: Plan For Next Visit
draftNarratives.draft: The plan for the next visit includes a comprehensive assessment of the patient's pain and mobility status, adjustment of pain management plan as needed, and coordination of physical therapy services.

draftNarratives.label: Care Plan Problems / Goals / Interventions
draftNarratives.draft: Problems: Severe mobility limitations, chronic pain. Goals: Improve mobility, manage pain. Interventions: Skilled nursing care, physical therapy, pain management.

draftNarratives.label: Patient / Caregiver Goals
draftNarratives.draft: Patient goals include improved mobility and pain management. Caregiver goals include supporting the patient's care plan and ensuring the patient's safety and comfort at home.
